event.notes: Strongest field in golf. Pete Dye design. Water in play on 16 holes. Fast TifEagle Bermuda greens. Winning scores last 10 years: -10 to -20. Positional course demanding precise landing areas.

data_quality.source_notes: Odds from FanDuel/DraftKings as of 2026-03-10. Player form from PGA Tour SG data and recent results. McIlroy injury status uncertain — listed in field but traveling Wednesday.

players.name: Scottie Scheffler
players.form_notes: Won The American Express (2026 W1). T24 Arnold Palmer Invitational — worst finish of year. Lost ~3 shots on approach at Bay Hill. Putter below average last 2 weeks. Two-time defending Players champion (2023 -17, 2024 -20). Won consecutive Players first in history. Strong tee-to-green and around the greens.
players.course_history: Won 2023 and 2024 Players. Course fits his positional, all-around game.

players.name: Rory McIlroy
players.form_notes: WD Arnold Palmer Invitational after R2 with back injury. T2 Genesis Invitational. Defending Players champion (2025, won playoff at -12). Still in field as of 2026-03-10, traveling Wednesday. Distance/driving central to his game — back injury is a real concern.
players.course_history: Two-time Players champion (2019 and 2025). Extremely comfortable at TPC Sawgrass.

players.name: Collin Morikawa
players.form_notes: Won AT&T Pebble Beach 2026. T7 Genesis Invitational. Solo 5th Arnold Palmer Invitational (three-putt bogey 18). Putter performing above average in 2026. Seventh Players start — average attempts before winning here is 7+. Two-time major champion. Elite iron/wedge play, great course fit.
players.course_history: Career-best T10 at TPC Sawgrass last year. Historically held back by putting, but putting improved in 2026.

players.name: Ludvig Aberg
players.form_notes: Started season with WD then MC. T37 Pebble Beach. T20 Genesis. T3 Arnold Palmer Invitational (66-67 weekend). Back on track. 4th in Proximity. Fires at flags well — suits below-average-sized greens at TPC Sawgrass. Cool demeanor under pressure.
players.course_history: Won an event at TPC Sawgrass in 2025 (non-Players). Limited Players history.

players.name: Si Woo Kim
players.form_notes: Perfect 7-for-7 in 2026 making cuts. Five T13 or better finishes. 2nd in SG Tee-to-Green and SG Approach in 2026. Won Players in 2017 (youngest ever, aged 21). 8 for 8 completing events. Last win: 2023 Sony Open. Age 30.
players.course_history: Won here in 2017. Has cashed in all 8 completed starts at TPC Sawgrass. Most comfortable on one of the most uncomfortable courses on tour.

players.name: Akshay Bhatia
players.form_notes: Just won Arnold Palmer Invitational in playoff over Berger. Third career PGA Tour win. Trailed by 5 on Sunday back nine and came back. Hot form over last 4 tournaments. High upside/high variance profile.

players.name: Russell Henley
players.form_notes: T6 Arnold Palmer Invitational, bogey-free weekend. Top 20 in every tournament except one MC at Genesis in 2026. Model-consistent ball-striker. 1.53 SG per round tee-to-green in 2026 (one of six players above 1.5).
players.course_history: Solid TPC Sawgrass record. Under the radar pick.

recommendations.reasoning: Elite iron/wedge play is tailor-made for TPC Sawgrass. Putter performing above average in 2026 — the one historical weakness. At his 7th attempt (average win attempt is 7+), form is the best it has been here. Morikawa at +1800 represents real value if putting holds.
invalidation_conditions: Putting reverts to below-average form early in tournament
Course plays significantly softer than expected (reduces positional premium)

recommendations.reasoning: Perfect 7-for-7 making cuts in 2026. 2nd in SG Tee-to-Green and SG Approach. Course winner and historically dominant here. Top-10 at +300 is strong value given his form and course comfort. Putting at TPC Sawgrass is historically near-neutral for him (loses just -0.01 SG/round here since 2015).
invalidation_conditions: Any injury report or withdrawal news
Unusually windy conditions (his game is less wind-resilient than peers)

recommendations.reasoning: 1.53 SG/round tee-to-green in 2026 — elite ball-striking. Consistent top-20 finishes all year. Bogey-free weekend at Arnold Palmer. Flying under the radar at +3000 outright. Top-10 at +350 is value.
invalidation_conditions: Any missed cuts or form collapse before tournament start

recommendations.reasoning: PASS at current odds. Back injury creates massive uncertainty. His game relies on distance and driver dominance — a compromised back could significantly reduce his effectiveness. Defending champion pedigree and course comfort is compelling but not at +1600 with injury uncertainty. Would reconsider at +2500+ if injury downgraded.
invalidation_conditions: Any medical update confirming back injury severity
Odds do not lengthen to +2500 or better by Wednesday
Reports of him not hitting driver at practice

risk_flags: McIlroy injury status unresolved — all McIlroy positions should be treated as speculative until Wednesday practice report
Scheffler approach play was -3 shots at Arnold Palmer — if that continues at TPC Sawgrass the water hazards will punish him
No live odds feed — all odds as of 2026-03-10 18:00 UTC and may have moved

passes_and_traps.reason: Too short at +480 given recent form dip and approach volatility. Would need +600 or better to justify given precision demands of TPC Sawgrass water hazards.
Injury uncertainty makes +1600 unplayable. Revisit Wednesday after practice report.
